comment: Atlas-pet manifest for Mo. The sprite sheet (mochi.png) is a columnsĂ—rows grid of cell_widthĂ—cell_height RGBA cells (transparent background, chroma-keyed from #00FFFF at generation time). Each row is one agent-lifecycle state; frames are packed left-aligned, unused cells transparent. Row order is fixed and matches the mo_state enum. fps is a render choice, not part of the generated atlas.

states.purpose: calm resting, breathing, and blinking loop
waiting for approval, help, or user input
